basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Indore is recruiting 1 Executive - Placement post for its placement cell.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | desirable: Prior relevant experience in placement activities | age limit: 25 to 35 years
qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree in any discipline (preferably MBA (HR) or MSc Psychology) OR Bachelor’s Degree (preferably B.Tech) with at least 2 years relevant experience in HR / Placement / Academic Institutions / Corporate

how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates can apply for the Executive - Placement position as per the following steps:
Prepare a detailed application on plain paper or as per the format (if specified in the detailed advertisement) along with an updated Curriculum Vitae (CV)/Resume.

Attach self-attested copies of all supporting documents including: Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (from 10th standard onwards) Experience certificates (if applicable) Proof of Date of Birth Caste/Category certificate (if applicable) Any other relevant documents supporting your candidature
Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (from 10th standard onwards)
Any other relevant documents supporting your candidature
Send the complete application package via email or as prescribed in the official notification to the concerned authority / HR / Placement Cell of IIT Indore before the last date.
Applications received after the last date will not be considered.
The position is purely contractual through an outsourcing agency.
Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview / interaction.
Candidates must mention “Application for the post of Executive - Placement” in the subject line of the email (if applying via email).
Bring all original documents at the time of interview for verification.
Remuneration will be decided based on qualification, experience, and performance in the interview.
important_instructions: This is a contractual position through outsourcing agency. Remuneration will be decided based on qualification, experience, and interview performance. The engagement is initially for 2 years and extendable based on performance. Candidates must ensure they meet the age and qualification criteria before applying.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Indore has invited applications for the position of Executive - Placement on a contractual basis through outsourcing agency. Download IIT Indore Executive Placement Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 Job Requirements / Responsibilities
content_sections.text: Recruiter Engagement & Feedback Collection End-to-end Campus Recruitment Process Facilitation (Pre-placement talks, assessments, interviews, offers) Student Support & Query Handling regarding placements and internships Data Management, Record Keeping & Report Preparation

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Indore Executive Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested and eligible candidates can apply for the Executive - Placement position as per the following steps: Last Date to Apply: 15 July 2026 Important Notes: Applications received after the last date will not be considered. The position is purely contractual through an outsourcing agency. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview / interaction. Candidates must mention “Application for the post of Executive - Placement” in the subject line of the email (if applying via email). Bring all original documents at the time of interview for verification. Remuneration will be decided based on qualification, experience, and performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Indore Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This is a contractual position through outsourcing agency. Remuneration will be decided based on qualification, experience, and interview performance. The engagement is initially for 2 years and extendable based on performance. Candidates must ensure they meet the age and qualification criteria before applying.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Indore Executive Placement 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for Executive Placement at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: Master’s Degree (preferably MBA HR or MSc Psychology) OR Bachelor’s Degree with minimum 2 years relevant experience in HR/placements.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Executive Placement post at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: Salary ranges from ₹30,000/- to ₹45,000/- consolidated per month, depending on experience and performance.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for IIT Indore Placement Executive Recruitment?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for the Executive - Placement position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for IIT Indore Executive Placement job?
faq.answer: Candidates should be between 25 to 35 years of age.

faq.question: Q6. What is the nature of employment for this IIT Indore post?
faq.answer: It is a contractual non-teaching position through outsourcing agency for an initial period of 2 years.

faq.question: Q7. What are the main responsibilities of Executive - Placement at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: Key duties include recruiter coordination, campus recruitment facilitation, student support, and placement data management.

faq.question: Q8. Is prior experience mandatory for IIT Indore Placement Executive post?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates with relevant experience in HR, corporate, or academic placement activities.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: No. It is a contractual position for 2 years, extendable based on performance.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the location of posting for this IIT Indore recruitment?
faq.answer: The position is based at IIT Indore, Madhya Pradesh.
